LH.verdict: DIVERGES — likely downstream of T2 / Bowen ratio

diagnosis.is_localised_evidence: the 5 ranked defects all map to specific named M10-M14 milestones; W and QVAPOR healthy show dycore + advection are NOT the divergence source; static-field bitwise match for HGT/LANDMASK shows ingestion path is mostly right
method_artifacts_to_audit_BEFORE_using_t: theta convention (perturbation vs absolute) — single largest source of apparent error
T2 max-max 157 K — likely a single-cell outlier or NaN handling artifact, not real
SWDOWN unit handling (W/m² vs kW/m²) — exceeds physical max
HFX 4105 W/m² peak — unit, sign convention, or NaN handling check

verdict_evidence: The divergence pattern is multi-source but localised to named operators that map cleanly onto the planned M10-M14 milestones. The dycore in isolation (W, QVAPOR, 100-step coupled parity bitwise) is healthy. Static fields HGT/LANDMASK match bitwise. The defects are: (a) theta reference-state convention almost certainly wrong (cheap to test, cheap to fix), (b) surface flux magnitude / sign wrong (M12), (c) radiation initialization wrong (M13), (d) LU_INDEX static field wrong (M10), (e) boundary completeness partial (M14). All 5 are within the existing roadmap. No evidence of a deep architectural defect that would require redesign. RECOMMENDED ADJUSTMENT: insert a sub-sprint M9.C (1-3 days) BEFORE M11 to audit comparator + theta-convention, because if theta-convention is the issue the apparent divergence shrinks dramatically and re-prioritises the remaining 4 defects.
viability_caveats: 1000-step dycore parity not measured (codex sandbox GPU init blocker); manager-side rerun needed
The trace was a wrfout-level comparison not a per-operator-boundary trace; operator attribution is inferred from field signatures not directly observed
20260521 is a single case; the 30-case M20 ensemble will reveal how the defects vary across seasons
recommended_next_dispatch_order: M9.C theta + comparator audit (1-3 days, NEW)
M10 LU_INDEX static-field parity (1-2 wk, plan-original)
M11 dycore guard + theta limiter (2-3 wk, plan-original)
M12 surface flux + MYNN parity (2-4 wk, plan-original)
M13 radiation + land-surface diurnal (3-4 wk, plan-original)
M14 lateral BC completeness (2-3 wk, plan-original)
